questionHtml: Explain what may be deduced about the energy of the electron in the β– decay.
markschemeHtml:
the energy released is 3.54 – 0.48 = 3.06 «MeV»

this is shared by the electron and the antineutrino

so the electron’s energy varies from 0 to 3.06 «MeV»

[3 marks]

meta.title: Explain what may be deduced about the energy of the electron in the β– decay.
